name: africa-healthcare-ransomware
description: HuggingFace dataset: electricsheepafrica/africa-healthcare-ransomware

name: NSL-KDD
description: Improved version of KDD Cup 99 for network intrusion detection. Removes redundant records and balances difficulty levels. 4 attack categories: DoS, Probe, R2L, U2R.

name: CICIDS2017
description: Canadian Institute for Cybersecurity IDS dataset with realistic network traffic. Contains benign and 7 common attack types including Brute Force, DoS, Web Attack, Infiltration, Botnet, DDoS.
known_issues: Label noise in some attack categories

name: UNSW-NB15
description: Network intrusion detection dataset from UNSW Canberra with 9 attack families: Fuzzers, Analysis, Backdoors, DoS, Exploits, Generic, Reconnaissance, Shellcode, Worms.

name: CTU-13
description: Botnet traffic dataset from Czech Technical University. 13 scenarios of real botnet traffic mixed with normal traffic and background traffic.

name: EMBER
description: Endgame Malware BEnchmark for Research. 1.1M PE file features for malware classification. Includes raw features extracted from PE headers, imports, sections.

name: Drebin
description: Android malware dataset with 5,560 malware samples from 179 families. Features extracted from manifest and DEX code.

name: MalImg
description: Malware visualization dataset. Binary executables converted to grayscale images for visual classification. 25 malware families, 9,339 samples.

name: AdvBench
description: Adversarial behavior benchmark for LLMs. 520 harmful behaviors and 500 harmful strings for evaluating jailbreak attacks and safety alignment.

name: TrojAI
description: IARPA TrojAI program datasets for detecting trojaned/backdoored AI models. Multiple rounds covering image classification, NLP, and reinforcement learning.

name: RobustBench
description: Standardized benchmark for adversarial robustness evaluation. Leaderboard for CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet with Linf, L2, corruptions threat models.

name: ImageNet-C
description: Corrupted ImageNet for evaluating model robustness to common image corruptions. 15 corruption types at 5 severity levels.

name: Prompt Injections (deepset)
description: Dataset for detecting prompt injection attacks in LLM applications. Contains both injection attempts and benign prompts for binary classification.

name: CyberSecEval 3
description: Meta's comprehensive cybersecurity evaluation suite for LLMs. Tests code generation security, prompt injection resistance, and harmful content generation.

name: SecurityEval
description: Benchmark for evaluating LLM-generated code security. 130 Python test cases across 75 CWE vulnerability types.

name: MITRE ATT&CK
description: Knowledge base of adversary tactics and techniques based on real-world observations. Covers Enterprise, Mobile, and ICS domains.

name: CVE Database (NVD)
description: NIST National Vulnerability Database. Comprehensive repository of security vulnerabilities with CVSS scoring, CWE mapping, and affected products.

name: CWE (Common Weakness Enumeration)
description: Community-developed list of software/hardware weakness types. 900+ weakness entries with descriptions, examples, mitigations, and detection methods.

name: OWASP Top 10 / LLM Top 10
description: OWASP security risk catalogs. Web Top 10 (2021) and LLM Top 10 (2025) provide ranked lists of critical security risks with descriptions and mitigations.

name: MNIST-Adversarial
description: Adversarial examples generated from MNIST. Used for benchmarking adversarial detection and robustness methods on simple image tasks.

name: SafeGuard Prompt Injection
description: Large-scale prompt injection dataset for training and evaluating injection detection models. Multiple attack categories with severity labels.

name: Code Vulnerability Security DPO
description: Dataset for Direct Preference Optimization on secure code generation. Pairs of vulnerable and secure code for training LLMs to prefer secure implementations.

name: Security TTP Mapping
description: Dataset mapping security incidents to MITRE ATT&CK tactics, techniques, and procedures. Useful for threat classification and detection research.

name: White Hat Security Agent Prompts 600K
description: 600K security-focused prompts for training and evaluating AI security agents. Covers ethical hacking scenarios, vulnerability assessment, and defense strategies.

name: EMBER 2018 v2
description: Updated EMBER malware dataset with improved feature extraction. 1M+ PE file feature vectors for malware/benign classification.

name: Lakera Mosscap Prompt Injection
description: Prompt injection dataset from Lakera's Gandalf challenge. Real-world prompt injection attempts collected from interactive game.

name: Adversarial QA
description: Adversarially-crafted reading comprehension dataset. Human annotators write questions to fool QA models, testing robustness of NLU systems.

name: CIFAR-10-C
description: Corrupted CIFAR-10 for robustness evaluation. 19 corruption types at 5 severity levels. Standard benchmark for corruption robustness.

name: FGSM Adversarial Examples
description: Pre-generated adversarial examples using Fast Gradient Sign Method. Multiple epsilon values on standard vision benchmarks.

name: AutoAttack Benchmark
description: Parameter-free adversarial attack ensemble benchmark. Standard evaluation for adversarial robustness with APGD-CE, APGD-DLR, FAB, and Square attacks.

name: HarmBench
description: Comprehensive benchmark for evaluating LLM safety and jailbreak resistance. 400+ harmful behaviors across multiple risk categories.

name: SecBench
description: Security knowledge benchmark for evaluating LLM cybersecurity capabilities. Multi-choice and open-ended questions across network, system, software, and crypto security.

name: VX Underground Malware Samples
description: Largest free malware sample collection. Decompiled source code and binary samples organized by family and year.
known_issues: Contains actual malware - handle with care

name: PowerShell Malware Detection
description: Dataset for detecting malicious PowerShell scripts. Contains obfuscated and deobfuscated samples with labels.

name: M-Attack V2 Adversarial Samples
description: Multimodal adversarial attack samples targeting vision-language models. Tests robustness of multimodal AI systems to visual perturbations.

name: CLIP Adversarial Typographic Attack
description: Dataset of typographic adversarial attacks on CLIP models. Text overlays on images that cause misclassification in vision-language models.

name: SQuAD Adversarial
description: Adversarial evaluation set for SQuAD reading comprehension. Tests model robustness to paraphrase and distractor sentence attacks.

name: SecRepo Security Datasets
description: Curated collection of security-related log files, network captures, and malware samples for security research and education.

name: Android Malware Genome Project
description: Over 1,200 Android malware samples from 49 different malware families. Systematic characterization of Android malware.

name: SARD (Software Assurance Reference Dataset)
description: NIST reference dataset for software vulnerability detection tools. Test cases in C/C++/Java with known vulnerability annotations.

name: MegaVul
description: Large-scale vulnerability detection dataset from real-world GitHub commits. Includes vulnerability-fixing commits with before/after code pairs.

name: Security Tools Dataset
description: Dataset of security tool descriptions, commands, and outputs. Useful for training security-focused LLMs and chatbots.

name: Security Paper Datasets
description: Collection of cybersecurity research papers and their metadata. Useful for literature review automation and security topic modeling.

name: ProtectAI Prompt Injection Validation
description: Validated prompt injection detection dataset from ProtectAI. Curated examples with confirmed labels for training production-grade detectors.

name: Lakera B3 Agent Security Benchmark
description: Benchmark for evaluating AI agent security. Tests resistance to indirect prompt injection, data exfiltration, and privilege escalation in agent workflows.

name: Neuralchemy Prompt Injection
description: Diverse prompt injection attack dataset. Multiple injection strategies including goal hijacking, payload injection, and context manipulation.

name: CSE-CIC-IDS2018
description: Updated CIC IDS dataset with AWS-based network infrastructure. 7 attack scenarios including brute force, heartbleed, botnet, DoS, DDoS, web attacks, and infiltration.

name: KDD Cup 1999
description: Classic network intrusion detection dataset. Despite known limitations (redundancy, imbalance), remains widely cited as a baseline reference.
known_issues: Highly redundant records, unrealistic traffic patterns. Prefer NSL-KDD.

name: BODMAS Malware Dataset
description: Blue Hexagon Open Dataset for Malware AnalysiS. Timestamped malware samples for studying concept drift in malware classification.

name: Phishing Website Dataset
description: Features extracted from URLs for phishing website detection. Binary classification with 30+ URL-based and page-based features.

name: FaceForensics++
description: Large-scale face manipulation detection benchmark. 1,000 original videos and corresponding manipulations from 4 methods: Deepfakes, Face2Face, FaceSwap, NeuralTextures.

name: Deepfake Detection Challenge (DFDC)
description: Facebook's deepfake detection challenge dataset. 100,000+ clips with various manipulation techniques for robust deepfake detection research.

name: JailbreakBench
description: NeurIPS 2024 benchmark with 100 unique misuse behaviors sourced from AdvBench, Trojan Red Teaming Competition, HarmBench. 10 categories based on OpenAI usage policies.

name: WildJailbreak
description: Allen AI's 262K synthetic safety training dataset with vanilla and adversarial prompt-response pairs. Addresses exaggerated safety (over-refusal) by providing contrastive harmful/benign queries.

name: JailBreakV-28K
description: 28,000 jailbreak text-image pairs covering 16 safety policies and 5 diverse jailbreak methods. Multimodal benchmark for vision-language model safety.

name: LLMail-Inject
description: Largest indirect injection attack dataset with 208,095 unique attack prompts. Simulates indirect injection attacks on LLM-based email assistants.

name: Open-Prompt-Injection
description: Framework for formalizing and benchmarking prompt injection attacks and defenses. Includes SST-2, SMS Spam tasks and detectors like DataSentinel, PromptLocate.

name: ALERT Red Teaming
description: 15,000 red teaming prompts classified by safety risk taxonomy. Includes suffix injection augmentation and DPO training dataset.

name: APRICOT (Adversarial Patches in Context)
description: MITRE's 1,000+ real-world adversarial patch images for object detection. Designed for COCO-based detection models.

name: DReLAB
description: Botnet detection adversarial resilience benchmark. Generated using Deep RL (Double DQN, Deep Sarsa) with realistic feature constraints.

name: MCPTox
description: Benchmark for poisoned MCP tools. Evaluates tool poisoning attacks where malicious instructions are hidden in tool metadata.

name: PoisonedRAG
description: USENIX Security 2025 dataset for RAG pipeline poisoning. Injects 5 malicious texts per target question into databases of millions. NQ, HotpotQA, MS-MARCO scales.

name: FORTRESS
description: Frontier Risk Evaluation for National Security. 500 adversarial + 500 benign text prompts with grading rubrics. Evaluated across 26 frontier models.

name: CICIoT2023
description: IoT network intrusion detection dataset. Covers 33 attack types across DDoS, DoS, Recon, Web, BruteForce, Spoofing, and Mirai categories.

name: ART-SafeBench
description: Fujitsu's AI safety research benchmark integrating adversarial prompts, jailbreak attacks, and toxicity. Includes RAGuard, FigStep, HarmBench, InjecAgent adapters.

name: Prompt Injection Benchmark for RAG
description: 847 adversarial cases for evaluating prompt injection in RAG pipelines. Supports module-level and end-to-end defense evaluation with domain diversity.
